mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_mentor_board.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTOR_BOARD(mentorboard_number, board_title, board_content, member_number) VALUES(#{mentorBoardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{memberNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_number AS memberNumber, m.member_id AS memberId, b.mentorboard_number AS mentorBoardNumber, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_date AS boardDate, b.board_click AS boardClick FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_MENTOR_BOARD b ON b.member_number = m.member_number WHERE b.mentorboard_number = #{mentorBoardNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT m.member_number AS memberNumber, m.member_id AS memberId, b.mentorboard_number AS mentorBoardNumber, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_date AS boardDate, b.board_click AS boardClick FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_MENTOR_BOARD b ON m.member_number = b.member_number ORDER BY b.board_date DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
